texto: Hello. It is Monday. I live in Sun City. Sun City is a city that is entirely contained inside an enormous concrete building in the shape of a sun. Its rays house our living quarters
autor: its circular centre is where we work and shop. No one has ever been outside of the city
explicacao: Citação de its circular centre is where we work and shop. No one has ever been outside of the city sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Hello. It is Monday. I live in Sun City. Sun City is a city that is entirely contained inside an …” articula vida, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como segunda-feira e inspiracao.
